name: Pasta Primavera
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion, garlic, and mushrooms.
2. Sauté over high heat in enough sherry to keep ingredients moist for about 10 minutes.
3. Bring water to boil.
4. Reduce heat under vegetables and add evaporated milk.
5. Add pasta to boiling water.
6. Simmer sauce over low heat while pasta cooks.
7. Season with salt and black pepper as desired.
8. Cook pasta until done, approximately 5 minutes.
9. Drain pasta, pour sauce over it, and serve.
10. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese or nutritional yeast and additional black pepper to taste.
